FIGHTER_RELIC_FIGHTER_HEADBAND.title: Fighter's Headband
FIGHTER_RELIC_FIGHTER_HEADBAND.descripti:
Your attacks deal [gold]1.2x[/gold] damage to enemies with Attack intent, granting [blue]2[/blue] frames.
While at negative frames, enemy attacks deal [red]1.2x[/red] damage.
After fully blocking, your next attack deals [gold]1.2x[/gold] damage, granting [blue]4[/blue] frames.
FIGHTER_RELIC_SPIRIT_CHARM.title: Spirit Charm
FIGHTER_RELIC_SPIRIT_CHARM.description:
Start combat with [blue]6[/blue] Fighting Spirit.
Gain +1 STR +1 DEX while you have spirit.
Gain [blue]1[/blue] spirit per turn (max 6).
At 0 spirit, enter [red]burnout[/red]: no spirit gain for 2 turns, gain 2 Weak + 2 Vulnerable.
After burnout, refill to 6 spirit.
FIGHTER_RELIC_SUPER_ART_TALISMAN.title: Super Art Talisman
FIGHTER_RELIC_SUPER_ART_TALISMAN.descrip: Every [blue]3[/blue] attacks, gain [gold]1[/gold] Super Gauge (max 3 bars).
